title: A New Approach to Solve Balance and Unbalance Assignment Problem
author: Muley, Yogesh
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The Balance and Unbalance Assignment Problem is a special case of the Transportation Problem, where the objective is to assign a number of resources to the equal number of activities at a minimum cost (or maximum profit). In this paper we pro- pose a new approach to solve Balance and Unbalance Assignment Problem, by using “Ghadle and Muley Method (Modified Vogel’s Approximation Method)” which will give optimal solution directly within few steps. It is very easy to calculate and understand, and at last we have illustrated some numerical examples.
steps_raw: The Balance and Unbalance Assignment Problem is a special case of the Transportation Problem, where the objective is to assign a number of resources to the equal number of activities at a minimum cost (or maximum profit). In this paper we pro- pose a new approach to solve Balance and Unbalance Assignment Problem, by using “Ghadle and Muley Method (Modified Vogel’s Approximation Method)” which will give optimal solution directly within few steps. It is very easy to calculate and understand, and at last we have illustrated some numerical examples.
